title: cerasus × javorkae
intro: Cerasus × javorkae, also known as the Javorka plum, is a hybrid cherry tree species that is a cross between the Cerasus avium and Prunus fruticosa. The bark and leaves of this plant are known for their medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where they are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Cerasus × javorkae include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Cerasus × javorkae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
